title: X-Life
description: Health mod for the X Life SMP series.
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Promotion Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ee9630c7-c981-45f9-9862-3a1d71a628bf.webp)](https://redirect.daqem.com?to=https%3A%2F%2Fbisecthosting.com%2FDAQEM%3Fr%3DXLifeModModrinth) [![Ko-fi Promotion Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SU7HhbO.png)](https://ko-fi.com/daqem)

If you're interested in hosting a server for X Life (or a different modpack), click the image below!

 

BisectHosting is the official sponsor of X Life!  With their automated modpack install, setting up and updating an X Life server is done with a few mouse clicks. Use the code DAQEM to receive 25% off your first month as a new client for any of their gaming servers. I recommend getting a plan with at LEAST 6GB of RAM for my modpack.

 

With this mod, you'll start off with 1 heart. Every time you die, 1 heart will be added. If you die with 10 hearts, you'll be put in spectator mode.

 

Want to support the creator? https://www.paypal.me/daqemyt

 

 

Running into any issues? Join our discord: https://daqem.com/discord

 

Admin commands:

/sethealth [playername] [amount of hearts] (sets player max health)

/gethealth [playername] (gives you the health and max health of a player)

/about xlifehealth (about page of the mod)

 

Have fun!
